subcodes.first_line: This is a Book inscribed, sent down from the presence of God, the All-Subduing, the Self-Subsisting, that thereby He may test those who have believed [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب مسطور نزل من لدی الله المهیمن القیوم لیعرض به الذینهم آمنوا و
subcodes.subjects: @recompense; reward for belief; right action, @consolation and comfort, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
